terms.definition: A single editable/executable unit in a notebook; code cells run in the kernel, Markdown cells render formatted text.
The language process that executes a notebook's code and maintains the session's in-memory state across cells.
The In [n] number showing the order in which a cell was executed, not its position in the document.
Kernel state left by out-of-order or since-edited cells that can make a non-reproducible notebook appear to work.
Clearing the kernel and executing every cell top-to-bottom to verify the notebook is reproducible.
Stopping a currently running cell without clearing the kernel's state.
